# nest-backend documentation

> Generated by compodoc 2.0.0 at 2026-07-11T15:15:42.800Z, llm-md export.

## Modules

### AppModule

File: `src/app.module.ts`
imports: `CoreModule`, `FeaturesModule`, `InfrastructureModule`

### AuthModule

File: `src/features/auth/auth.module.ts`
providers: `AuthService`, `BcryptProvider`
imports: `CsrfModule`, `DeviceDetectionModule`, `SessionsModule`, `TokenModule`, `UsersModule`

### ClockModule

File: `src/core/clock/clock.module.ts`
providers: `ClockService`
exports: `ClockService`

### CoreModule

File: `src/core/core.module.ts`
imports: `ClockModule`
exports: `ClockModule`

### CsrfModule

File: `src/features/security/csrf/csrf.module.ts`
providers: `CsrfService`
exports: `CsrfService`

### DatabasesModule

File: `src/infrastructure/databases/databases.module.ts`
imports: `PostgresModule`, `RedisModule`

### DeviceDetectionModule

File: `src/features/security/device-detection/device-detection.module.ts`
providers: `DeviceDetectorService`, `DeviceMapper`, `FingerprintService`, `UserAgentParser`
exports: `DeviceDetectorService`, `DeviceMapper`

Methods:
- `configure(consumer: MiddlewareConsumer): void`

### EnvModule

File: `src/infrastructure/config/env/env.module.ts`

File: `src/features/features.module.ts`
imports: `AuthModule`, `SecurityModule`, `SessionsModule`, `TokenModule`, `UsersModule`

providers: `DataResponseInterceptor`
imports: `DatabasesModule`, `EnvModule`

File: `src/infrastructure/databases/postgres/postgres.module.ts`

File: `src/features/security/rate-limit/rate-limit.module.ts`
providers: `RateLimitService`

exports: `RedisCounterService`, `RedisLockService`

exports: `DeviceDetectionModule`

File: `src/features/sessions/sessions.module.ts`
providers: `SessionsService`
exports: `SessionsService`

### TokenModule

File: `src/features/token/token.module.ts`

exports: `TokenService`

providers: `UsersService`
exports: `UsersService`

## Services / Injectables

### AuthCookieInterceptor

File: `src/features/auth/interceptors/auth-cookie.interceptor.ts`

Methods:
- `intercept(context: ExecutionContext, next: CallHandler): Observable<any>`

### AuthService

File: `src/features/auth/auth.service.ts`

Methods:
- `changeUserPassword(userId: string, sessionId: string, : ChangePasswordRequestDto): Promise<void>`
- `loginUser(: LoginUserRequestDto, ipAddress: string, device: DeviceContext): Promise<AuthTokens>`
- `refresh(refreshToken: string): unknown`
- `registerUser(dto: RegisterUserRequestDto): Promise<void>`

### BcryptProvider

File: `src/features/auth/providers/bcrypt.provider.ts`

Methods:
- `compare(data: string | Buffer, encrypted: string): any`
- `hash(data: string | Buffer, roundsSalt: number = 10): unknown`

File: `src/core/clock/clock.service.ts`

Methods:
- `addDaysFrom(ms: number, days: number): Date`
- `nowMs(): number`
- `snapshot(): { now: number; expiresAt: Date; }`

Methods:

- `validate(cookieToken?: string, headerToken?: string): boolean`

Methods:

File: `src/features/security/device-detection/detector/device-detector.service.ts`

Methods:

- `consume(route: string, ip: string, limit: number, ttl: number): unknown`

File: `src/infrastructure/databases/redis/redis-counter.service.ts`

Methods:
- `get(key: string): unknown`
- `increment(key: string, ttl?: number): unknown`

File: `src/infrastructure/databases/redis/redis-lock.service.ts`

Methods:
- `acquire(lockKey: RedisKey, lockIdentifier: string, ttlSeconds: number = 5): Promise<boolean>`
- `getFullKey(key: RedisKey, value: string): string`
- `release(key: RedisKey, value: string): any`

### RedisService

File: `src/infrastructure/databases/redis/redis.service.ts`

Methods:
- `del(key: string): Promise<number>`
- `get(key: string): unknown`
- `onModuleDestroy(): any`
- `set(key: RedisKey, value: string | number | Buffer): Promise<OK>`
- `setWithExpiry(key: RedisKey, value: string | number | Buffer, ttlSeconds: number): Promise<OK>`

File: `src/infrastructure/http/interceptors/serialize.interceptor.ts`

Methods:
- `intercept(_: ExecutionContext, next: CallHandler): any`

### SessionsService

File: `src/features/sessions/sessions.service.ts`

Methods:
- `getActive(userId: string, sessionId: string): Promise<Session | null>`
- `issue(userId: string, ipAddress: string, device: ISessionDevice, expiresAt: Date): unknown`
- `list(userId: string, session: Session): Promise<SessionListItem[]>`
- `revoke(userId: string, sessionId: string): Promise<void>`
- `rotateAtomic(sessionId: string, version: number, oldHash: string, newHash: string, meta: { now: number; expiresAt: Date }): Promise<boolean>`
- `rotateRefreshToken(sessionId: string, oldHash: string, newHash: string, meta: { lastUsedAt: Date; expiresAt: Date; rotatedAt: Date }): Promise<boolean>`
- `terminateOthers(userId: string, sessionId: string): Promise<void>`
- `updateRefreshState(session: Session, payload: Partial<Session>): Promise<void>`

### TokenService

File: `src/features/token/token.service.ts`

Methods:
- `issuePair(userId: string, sessionId: string, now: number, expiresAt: Date): unknown`
- `validatePayload(: IJwtPayload): Promise<CustomAuth>`
- `verifyAccessToken(token: string): Promise<IJwtClaims>`
- `verifyRefreshToken(token: string): Promise<IJwtClaims>`

### UserAgentParser

File: `src/features/security/device-detection/user-agent/user-agent.parser.ts`

Methods:
- `mapDeviceType(type?: string): IUserAgent['deviceType']`
- `parse(ua: string): IUserAgent`

### UsersService

File: `src/features/users/users.service.ts`

Methods:
- `findById(id: string): Promise<User>`
- `findByIdentifierForAuth(identifier: string): Promise<User | null>`
- `findByIdForSessionValidation(userId: string): Promise<User | null>`
- `findByIdWithPassword(userId: string): Promise<User | null>`
- `findByIdWithSelect(id: string, select: FindOptionsSelect<User>): Promise<User | null>`
- `handleUniqueConstraintError(error: any): void`
- `list(): Promise<User[]>`
- `register(createUserRequestDto: CreateUserRequestDto): Promise<void>`
- `requestAccountDeletion(userId: string): Promise<void>`
- `setPassword(userid: string, hashPassword: string): Promise<void>`
- `updateProfile(id: string, updateUserRequestDto: UpdateUserRequestDto): Promise<void>`

## Interfaces

### CustomAuth

File: `src/infrastructure/http/interfaces/custom-request.interface.ts`

Properties:
- `session: Session`
- `user: User`

### DeviceContext

File: `src/features/security/device-detection/context/device-context.interface.ts`
Extends: `IUserAgent`

Properties:
- `fingerprint?: string`
- `fingerprintRisk?: "low" | "medium" | "high"`
- `isTrusted?: boolean`
- `browserName: string`
- `browserVersion: string`
- `deviceModel?: string`
- `deviceType: "mobile" | "tablet" | "desktop"`
- `deviceVendor?: string`
- `osName: string`

### IAuthService

File: `src/features/auth/interfaces/auth.interface.ts`

Methods:
- `changeUserPassword(userId: string, sessionId: string, : ChangePasswordRequestDto): Promise<void>`
- `loginUser(dto: LoginUserRequestDto, ipAddress: string, device: DeviceContext): Promise<AuthTokens>`
- `refresh(refreshToken: string): Promise<AuthTokens>`
- `registerUser(dto: RegisterUserRequestDto): Promise<void>`

File: `src/features/security/device-detection/fingerprint/fingerpint.interface.ts`

Properties:
- `browserName: string`
- `deviceType: string`
- `ip: string`
- `osName: string`
- `ua: string`

File: `src/features/token/interfaces/jwt-payload.interface.ts`
Extends: `IJwtPayload`

Properties:
- `exp: number`
- `iat: number`
- `role?: string`
- `sessionId: string`
- `sub: string`

File: `src/infrastructure/config/jsonwebtoken/jwt.config.ts`

Properties:
- `secret: string`

File: `src/features/token/interfaces/jwt-payload.interface.ts`

Properties:
- `role?: string`
- `sessionId: string`
- `sub: string`

File: `src/infrastructure/http/interfaces/custom-request.interface.ts`
Extends: `Request`

Properties:
- `session: Session`
- `user: User`

- `browserName: string`
- `browserVersion: string`
- `deviceType: "mobile" | "tablet" | "desktop"`
- `osName: string`

File: `src/features/sessions/interfaces/sessions.interface.ts`

- `issue(userId: string, ipAddress: string, device: ISessionDevice, expiresAt: Date): Promise<Session>`
- `list(userId: string, session: Session): Promise<SessionListItem[]>`
- `revoke(userId: string, sessionId: string): Promise<void>`
- `rotateAtomic(sessionId: string, version: number, oldHash: string, newHash: string, meta: { now: number; expiresAt: Date }): Promise<boolean>`
- `terminateOthers(userId: string, sessionId: string): Promise<void>`
- `updateRefreshState(session: Session, payload: Partial<Session>): Promise<void>`

- `app: INestApplication`
- `dataSource: DataSource`

- `validatePayload(payload: IJwtPayload): Promise<CustomAuth>`
- `verifyAccessToken(token: string): Promise<IJwtPayload>`
- `verifyRefreshToken(token: string): Promise<IJwtPayload>`

- `osName: string`

- `ttl: number`

## Public functions

- `ApiChangePassword()`
  Defined in `src/features/auth/auth.swagger.ts`
- `ApiLoginUser()`
  Defined in `src/features/auth/auth.swagger.ts`
- `ApiRegisterUser()`
  Defined in `src/features/auth/auth.swagger.ts`
- `bootstrap()`
  Defined in `src/main.ts`
- `clearRedis(app: INestApplication)`
  Defined in `test/helpers/redis.helper.ts`
- `createTestApp(): Promise<ITextContext>`
  Defined in `test/bootstrap/test-app.ts`
- `createUserDto(overrides: object = {})`
  Defined in `test/helpers/create-user.helper.ts`
- `EmailField()`
  Defined in `src/infrastructure/http/validation/fields/email-field.decorator.ts`
- `extractRefreshToken(setCookie)`
  Defined in `test/utils/cookie.util.ts`
- `getCookie(setCookies, name: string): string`
  Defined in `test/utils/cookie.util.ts`
- `getCookieValue(headers, name: string)`
  Defined in `test/utils/cookie.util.ts`
- `normalizeHeader(setCookieHeader): string[]`
  Defined in `test/utils/cookie.util.ts`
- `normalizeUA(ua?: string): string`
  Defined in `src/features/security/device-detection/utils/normalize-ua.util.ts`
- `PasswordField(options?: ApiPropertyOptions)`
  Defined in `src/infrastructure/http/validation/fields/password-field.decorator.ts`
- `runMigrations(dataSource: DataSource)`
  Defined in `test/helpers/postgresql.helper.ts`
- `Serialize(dto: any)`
  Defined in `src/infrastructure/http/interceptors/decorators/serialize.decorator.ts`
- `setupApp(app: INestApplication)`
  Defined in `src/bootstrap.ts`
- `truncateDatabase(dataSource: DataSource)`
  Defined in `test/helpers/postgresql.helper.ts`
- `UsernameField()`
  Defined in `src/infrastructure/http/validation/fields/username-field.decorator.ts`

## Public type aliases

- `type AuthenticatedOptions = { loginBy?: LoginIdentifier; overrides?: Partial<TestUser>; withRole?: UserRole }`
- `type AuthenticatedUserContext = FactoryContext<TestUser | AuthenticatedUserResponse>`
- `type AuthenticatedUserResponse = CreateUserResponse & literal type`
- `type AuthTokens = { accessToken: string; refreshToken: string }`
- `type CreateUserContext = FactoryContext<TestUser | CreateUserResponse>`
- `type CreateUserResponse = { register: Response }`
- `type FactoryContext = { client: ApiClient; user: TUser; response: TResponse }`
- `type HttpMethod = "get" | "post" | "put" | "delete"`
- `type issuedTokens = { accessToken: string; refreshToken: string }`
- `type LoginIdentifier = "email" | "username"`
- `type RequestConfig = { headers?: Record<string, string>; query?: Record<string, unknown>; body?: TBody }`
- `type RequestOptions = { method: HttpMethod; url: string; headers?: Record<string, string>; query?: Record<string, unknown>; body?: string | object }`
- `type SessionListItem = Session & literal type`
- `type TestUser = ReturnType<typeof createUser>`

## Public enumerations

- `enum AuthErrorCode`
  - `INVALID_CREDENTIALS = INVALID_CREDENTIALS`
  - `ACCOUNT_DISABLED = ACCOUNT_DISABLED`
  - `ACCOUNT_NOT_VERIFIED = ACCOUNT_NOT_VERIFIED`
  - `INVALID_CURRENT_PASSWORD = INVALID_CURRENT_PASSWORD`
  - `PASSWORD_MUST_BE_DIFFERENT = PASSWORD_MUST_BE_DIFFERENT`

- `enum DomainErrorCode`
  - `HTTP_EXCEPTION = HTTP_EXCEPTION`
  - `INTERNAL_ERROR = INTERNAL_ERROR`
  - `VALIDATION = VALIDATION_ERROR`

- `enum ErrorDomain`
  - `AUTH = AUTH`
  - `USER = USER`
  - `SESSION = SESSION`
  - `TOKEN = TOKEN`
  - `SYSTEM = SYSTEM`
  - `HTTP = HTTP`
  - `VALIDATION = VALIDATION`
  - `SECURITY = SECURITY`

- `enum RedisKey`
  - `REFRESH_LOCK = refresh:lock`
  - `RATE_LIMIT = rate:limit`

- `enum SecurityErrorCode`
  - `ACCESS_DENIED = ACCESS_DENIED`
  - `AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED = AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED`
  - `RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED`
  - `INVALID_CSRF_TOKEN = INVALID_CSRF_TOKEN`

- `enum SessionErrorCode`
  - `SESSION_NOT_FOUND = SESSION_NOT_FOUND`
  - `SESSION_EXPIRED = SESSION_EXPIRED`
  - `SESSION_REVOKED = SESSION_REVOKED`
  - `SESSION_REUSE_DETECTED = SESSION_REUSE_DETECTED`
  - `REFRESH_RATE_LIMITED = REFRESH_RATE_LIMITED`

- `enum TokenErrorCode`
  - `INVALID_TOKEN = INVALID_TOKEN`
  - `EXPIRED_TOKEN = EXPIRED_TOKEN`
  - `INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN = INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN`

- `enum UserErrorCode`
  - `USER_NOT_FOUND = USER_NOT_FOUND`
  - `EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS = EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS`
  - `USERNAME_ALREADY_EXISTS = USERNAME_ALREADY_EXISTS`

- `enum UserRole`
  - `ADMIN = ADMIN`
  - `USER = USER`

- `enum UserStatus`
  - `ACTIVATE = ACTIVATE`
  - `DEACTIVATE = DEACTIVATE`
  - `SUSPEND = SUSPEND`
